steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
# Compute indicators for Serena Energia (DT)
price = 9.40
issued = 622_730_556
treasury = 42_205
outstanding = issued - treasury
print('outstanding', outstanding)
# Balance sheet 2024-12-31
AT_total = 20_161_754_000
CA = 2_827_378_000
CL = 2_851_182_000
short_debt = 1_922_299_000
long_debt = 10_181_449_000
debt_gross = short_debt + long_debt
cash = 1_427_974_000
net_debt = debt_gross - cash
# Revenues and profits (12m, 2024)
rev_net = 4_037_553_000
cogs = 2_739_425_000
gross_profit = rev_net - cogs  # should equal 1,405? we'll compute
# The dataset shows Gross Profit = 1,385,555,000 in 2024-12
# Let's set the gross_profit according to the dataset to avoid mismatch
gross_profit = 1_385_555_000
ebit = 1_549_436_000
dep_amort = 754_049_000
net_income = 297_423_000
operating_margin = ebit / rev_net
gross_margin = gross_profit / rev_net
net_margin = net_income / rev_net
ebit_to_asset = ebit / AT_total
roic = ebit / (AT_total - long_debt)  # not exact; below we use AT - Fornecedores - Caixa; We'll compute properly below
fornecedores = 292_524_000
cash2 = cash
roic = ebit / (AT_total - fornecedores - cash2)
roe = net_income / (5_700_221_000)
# EV
market_cap = outstanding * price
enterprise_value = market_cap + net_debt
ebitda = ebit + dep_amort
ev_ebitda = enterprise_value / ebitda
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit
lpa = net_income / outstanding
vpa = 5_700_221_000 / outstanding
psr = price / (rev_net / outstanding)
p_s_r = price / (rev_net/outstanding)
p_to_ativos = price / (AT_total/outstanding)
p_cap_giro = price / ((CA - CL)/outstanding)
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ((CA - CL)/outstanding)
print('outstanding', outstanding)
print('market_cap', market_cap)
print('net_debt', net_debt)
print('ev', enterprise_value)
print('ebitda', ebitda)
print('rev_net', rev_net)
print('gross_profit', gross_profit)
print('gross_margin', gross_margin)
print('operating_margin', operating_margin)
print('net_margin', net_margin)
print('ebit_to_asset', ebit_to_asset)
print('roic', roic)
print('roe', roe)
print('lpa', lpa)
print('vpa', vpa)
print('psr', psr)
print('p_to_ativos', p_to_ativos)
print('p_cap_giro', p_cap_giro)
print('p_ativ_circ_liq', p_ativ_circ_liq)
print('ev/ebitda', ev_ebitda)
print('ev/ebit', ev_ebit)
# P/L and P/EBIT etc per share
p_ebit = price / (ebit/outstanding)
p_ebit_num = p_ebit
p_loan_capital = None
print('p/ebit', p_ebit)
# P/L, P/VP, P/L per share already computed
p_ebitda = price / (ebitda/outstanding)
p_l = price / (net_income/outstanding)
print('P/EBITDA', p_ebitda)
print('P/L', p_l)
"} }``````"} 

}

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Compute indicators for Serena Energia (DT)
price = 9.40
issued = 622_730_556
treasury = 42_205
outstanding = issued - treasury
print('outstanding', outstanding)
# Balance sheet 2024-12-31
AT_total = 20_161_754_000
CA = 2_827_378_000
CL = 2_851_182_000
short_debt = 1_922_299_000
long_debt = 10_181_449_000
debt_gross = short_debt + long_debt
cash = 1_427_974_000
net_debt = debt_gross - cash
# Revenues and profits (12m, 2024)
rev_net = 4_037_553_000
cogs = 2_739_425_000
# Gross profit according to dataset
gross_profit = 1_385_555_000
ebit = 1_549_436_000
dep_amort = 754_049_000
net_income = 297_423_000
# Margins
gross_margin = gross_profit / rev_net
operating_margin = ebit / rev_net
net_margin = net_income / rev_net
# Asset turns
# ROIC uses (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
fornecedores = 292_524_000
roic = ebit / (AT_total - fornecedores - cash)
roe = net_income / 5_700_221_000
# EV and multiples
market_cap = outstanding * price
enterprise_value = market_cap + net_debt
ebitda = ebit + dep_amort
# to be careful: if outstanding is 0 -> skip; but here it's non-zero
ev_ebitda = enterprise_value / EBITDA if False else enterprise_value / ebitda
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit
# per share metrics
lpa = net_income / outstanding
vpa = 5_700_221_000 / outstanding
psr = price / (rev_net / outstanding)
p_to_ativos = price / (AT_total / outstanding)
p_cap_giro = price / ((CA - CL) / outstanding)
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ((CA - CL) / outstanding)
# P/L and P/EBIT
p_ebit = price / (ebit / outstanding)
p_ebitda = price / (ebitda / outstanding)
p_l = price / (net_income / outstanding)
p_veps = None
print('market_cap', market_cap)
print('enterprise_value', enterprise_value)
print('net_debt', net_debt)
print('ebitda', ebitda)
print('ev/ebitda', ev_ebitda)
print('ev/ebit', ev_ebit)
print('gross_margin', gross_margin)
print('operating_margin', operating_margin if 'operating_margin' in locals() else None)
print('net_margin', net_margin if 'net_margin' in locals() else None)
print('roic', roic)
print('roe', roe)
print('lpa', lpa)
print('vpa', vpa)
print('psr', psr)
print('p_to_ativos', p_to_ativos)
print('p_cap_giro', p_cap_giro)
print('p_ativ_circ_liq', p_ativ_circ_liq)
print('p_ebit', p_ebit)
print('p_ebitda', p_ebitda)
print('p_l', p_l)
"} }

"} }
